ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the patient is associated with */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "test_results" TEXT /* Test results for the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the hospital */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the hospital */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the hospital */,
  "available_beds" INTEGER /* Number of available beds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admissions" (
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the admission is associated with */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital where the patient was admitted */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of admission */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date of discharge */,
  "ward_number" INTEGER /* Number of the ward where the patient was admitted */,
  "bed_number" INTEGER /* Number of the bed where the patient was admitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_workers" (
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare worker */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare worker */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital where the worker is employed */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the healthcare worker (e.g., doctor, nurse) */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the healthcare worker (e.g., infectious disease, emergency medicine) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the healthcare worker */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the healthcare worker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_management" (
  "management_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case management activity */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the activity is associated with */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare worker performing the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., consultation, testing) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("management_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_management_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES healthcare_workers ("worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the contact is associated with */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the contact */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship between the contact and the case (e.g., family member, colleague) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_tracing" (
  "tracing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact tracing activity */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact the activity is associated with */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare worker performing the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., interview, testing) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_tracing_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES healthcare_workers ("worker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_tracing_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outbreaks" (
  "outbreak_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outbreak */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the outbreak is associated with */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the outbreak */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the outbreak */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the outbreak */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the outbreak */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outbreak_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outbreak_management" (
  "management_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outbreak management activity */,
  "outbreak_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outbreak the activity is associated with */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare worker performing the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., testing, quarantine) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("management_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outbreak_management_outbreak_id FOREIGN KEY ("outbreak_id") REFERENCES outbreaks ("outbreak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outbreak_management_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES healthcare_workers ("worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, epidemiologist) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, data access) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system setting */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the case type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the case type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case status */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the case status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the case status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)
